name: agent-chat
title: Agent Chat
description: Typed text, reasoning, and tool-call rendering with explicit streaming state.

notes: Rendered message content is host-owned; sanitize any HTML or markdown renderer you add.
The conversation landmark has a configurable label and the host composer owns keyboard behavior.

documentation.whenToUse: Use when a chat runtime already exposes typed message parts.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not use it as transport, persistence, authorization, or tool-state infrastructure.
tradeoffs: Transport, persistence, markdown, and tool-specific rendering remain application-owned.
